expectations.text: Agent finds at least one relevant entry about checkpoints (D- or L- or config entry)
expectations.evidence: Found D0129, D0134, L0131, P0048.4.6.1.14, P0048.1.3.3.2 — all directly relevant to checkpoint strategy.

expectations.text: Agent tries English variant (checkpoint, checkpointMode) if German search fails
expectations.evidence: Step 2: after 'Checkpoint-Strategie automatisch manuell' fails, immediately tries 'checkpoint strategy automatic manual', then bare 'checkpoint' — clear language switching.

expectations.text: Agent summarizes findings rather than dumping raw IDs
expectations.evidence: Output includes a formatted summary table (Primärmodus, Frühere Schwelle, Ausführung, Fallback, Konfigurierbar) plus narrative explanation — not a raw ID dump.
